Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.util

Class Exceptions

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.util.Exceptions
public final class Exceptions extends Object
Exception helper functions.

  • Constructor Details

    • Exceptions

      public Exceptions()
      Creates a new instance.

  • Method Details

    • createException

      public <E extends Exception> E createException(Class<E> type, String message, Throwable cause, boolean cleanStackTrace)
      Throws an exception with the specified message and cause.
      Type Parameters:
      E - the type of the exception
      Parameters:
      type - the type of the exception
      message - an explanation of what went wrong
      cause - the cause of the exception (null if absent)
      cleanStackTrace - true if stack trace references to this library should be removed, so long as it does not result in any user code being removed.
      Returns:
      the exception
      Throws:
      AssertionError - if type is null

    • removeLibraryFromStackTrace

      public void removeLibraryFromStackTrace(Throwable throwable, StackTraceElement[] stackTrace)
      Removes references to this library from an exception stack trace, so long as it does not result in any user code being removed.
      Parameters:
      throwable - the exception to process
      stackTrace - the stack trace elements to process
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if throwable is null

    • isOptimizedException

      public boolean isOptimizedException(Class<?> type)
      Indicates if the specified type is an optimized exception.

      The purpose of optimized exceptions is to defer GlobalRequirements.withCleanStackTrace() cleaning stack traces) until the stack trace is actually needed. If isCleanStackTrace() is false, no attempt is made to use optimized exceptions.

      Parameters:
      type - a class
      Returns:
      true if the class is an optimized exception

    • getContextMessage

      public String getContextMessage(Map<String,Object> threadContext, Configuration validatorConfiguration, String message, List<ContextLine> exceptionContext)
      Returns the requirements contextual information.
      Parameters:
      threadContext - the thread context
      validatorConfiguration - the validator configuration
      message - the exception message (null if absent)
      exceptionContext - the failure-specific context
      Returns:
      the requirements contextual information
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if any of the arguments are null
